subcodes.first_line: O my God, my God! I know not with what tongue I may supplicate Thee, nor with what heart I may entreat before Thy presence, though I know with absolute certitude [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: الهی الهی لم ادر بای لسان اتضرع الیک و بای قلب ابتهل بین یدیک و اعلم حق الیقین
subcodes.subjects: @eulogies; reminiscences, @transcendence; unknowability of God, @humility; meekness; lowliness
